{{Quote|Bern is a lieutenant with an armored battalion in the Generis Sector.|Celia Durasha informs [[Adion Lang]] about her brother's whereabouts|<ref name="ACPOV" />}}
'''Bern Durasha''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who was one of the sons of [[Reise Durasha]] and brother of [[Celia Durasha]]. He was a [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]] in the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] with an [[Armor battalion|armored battalion]] in the [[Atrivis sector/Legends|Atrivis sector]].

==Appearances==
